context: Tests whether the response explains cache invalidation strategies and recommends an appropriate one.

checklist.name: Explains write-through or write-behind
checklist.description: Describes write-through (update cache on write) or write-behind (async cache update) as strategies

checklist.name: Explains cache-aside with invalidation
checklist.description: Describes cache-aside (lazy loading) with explicit invalidation on write (delete cache key on update)

checklist.name: Recommends invalidation on write for this case
checklist.description: Recommends actively invalidating (deleting or updating) the cache entry when the user updates their profile, not just waiting for TTL

checklist.name: Addresses consistency vs performance tradeoff
checklist.description: Discusses the tradeoff between cache freshness and read performance, or mentions eventual consistency

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Caching patterns and Redis behavior are described correctly
